budgetEvidence.hardwareTimingRationale: A DMG physical frame is 70224 cycles. Packed preparation may consume one frame, but residency, commit, and visibility must complete within that frame without unsafe retained writes.
budgetEvidence.productionTraceRationale: The 90-frame GameboyMcp trace in docs/GameBoyPackedCameraCadenceAcceptance.md measured 87 source ticks, visible Y 86, and one-frame cold-edge publication on the exact tracked production ROM.
